UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORELAND, THAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, NINH THI $107,311.56 PRINCIPAL, $3,677.99 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $111,324.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORELAND, THAI AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, NINH THI JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NINH NGUYEN MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM APR-23-2008 TO LAW AND MOTION AT MAY-01-2008, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NINH NGUYEN'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. DEFENDANT WAS SERVED WITH THE COMPLAINT IN THE NEW YORK ACTION BUT THE COURT LACKED PERSONAL JURISDICTION OVER DEFENDANT. THE ONLY CONTACT DEFENDANT HAD WITH NEW YORK IS DESCRIBED AS "A SERIES OF PHONE CALLS" TO PLAINTIFF IN NEW YORK. IN ADDITION, THE PARTIES AGREED THAT THE TRANSACTION IS GOVERNED BY NEW YORK LAW AND PAYMENTS ON THE NOTE ARE TO BE MADE IN NEW YORK. ALL OF THE OTHER CONTRACTS OCCUR IN CALIFORNIA. THE NOTE IS SIGNED IN CALIFORNIA, THE PROCEEDS ARE USED IN CALIFORNIA AND PLAINTIFF'S FUNDS ARE TRANSFERRED FROM HER NEW YORK ACCOUNT TO DEFENDANT'S ACCOUNT IN CALIFORNIA. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DECISION IN GLASS V HARRIS (1988) 687 F. SUPP. 906 TO BE CONTROLLING AND IN SO RULING, THE COURT NOTES THE EMPHASIS PLACED ON THE DEPOSIT OF FUNDS IN NEW YORK IN THE CASE OF CATALYST ENERGY DEVELOPMENT CORP. V IRON MTN. MINES, INC. 630 F. SUPP. 1314. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT ("ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SISTER STATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT") JUDGMENT OF FEB-21-2008 SET ASIDE
